# Luminary

Follow the canonical repository guidance in [`AGENTS.md`](../AGENTS.md). Read
[`docs/architecture.md`](../docs/architecture.md) before changing ownership or combat semantics,
and [`docs/performance.md`](../docs/performance.md) before changing solver strategy, caps, or
fallbacks.

Keep changes focused, preserve public contracts unless the task requires otherwise, and use the
narrowest validation command listed in `AGENTS.md` while iterating.
